title: Venezuelan Crude Exports Drop In April Amid Export Licence Revocation
section_path: Venezuelan Crude Exports Drop In April Amid Export Licence Revocation
section_path_text: Venezuelan Crude Exports Drop In April Amid Export Licence Revocation
summary:
Main
In this piece, we examine the impact of the United States revoking Chevron's licence to operate in Venezuela. What could happen to US Gulf Coast refiners and Venezuela's future crude exports? By Florence Yu
Venezuela's crude exports fell 7% m-o-m in April, following the Trump administration's decision to revoke foreign companies' licences to operate in Venezuela, and payment uncertainties that led to cargo cancellations.
